InvoiceDate.instruction: Extract the invoice date from the document in mm/dd/yyyy format (e.g., 11/05/2025, 01/15/2024)

InvoiceNumber.instruction: Extract the invoice number from the document

Carrier.instruction: Extract the carrier name - company that is billing for this service and issued this invoice. Examples: BNSF, UP, CSX, NS, KCS, CP, CN, PGTX

Currency.instruction: Extract the currency code used in the invoice. Examples: USD

FeeAmount.instruction: Extract only the numeric value of the total fee amount without currency symbols, commas, or other formatting. Return as plain numbers with decimal point only (e.g., 45335.98 not $45,335.98)

PartyName.instruction: Extract the name of the party being billed

GLAccount.instruction: Extract the general ledger account code

BOLNumber.instruction: Extract the bill of lading number

OriginCity.instruction: Extract the origin city of the shipment

DestinationCity.instruction: Extract the destination city of the shipment

Comments.instruction: Extract any additional comments or notes from the invoice

STCC.instruction: Extract the Standard Transportation Commodity Code (STCC), which is a 7-digit numeric code used to classify the commodity being transported. This is different from SPLC which identifies locations.

ServiceDate.instruction: Extract the service date from the document in mm/dd/yyyy format (e.g., 11/05/2025, 01/15/2024)
